bookings.note: Not a relevant conversion metric for this client — Nearly Newborn is a digital course product, not a booked service.

new_this_period.name: NearlyNewborn_GifterCribIntent_Outreach_052326_v1
new_this_period.notes: Flagship new sequence targeting baby gifters via Crib/Bedding purchase-intent signals. Aligned with product model (digital course that can be gifted).

new_this_period.name: Nearly Newborn — Nursery Prep Parent Sequence
new_this_period.notes: Parent-direct sequence. Built alongside gift-giver sequence during audience research sprint.

sequence_audit.summary: 9 sequences total — 7 legacy (all paused from Report #1), 2 new this period. Email integration disconnected — zero sends this period. Strategic pivot to baby-gifter audience validated by market research.

key_insights.title: Strategic Audience Research Period — Gift-Giver Pivot Validated
key_insights.detail: This reporting period was intentionally non-executional. The team paused all legacy expecting-parent sequences to conduct deep audience research — identifying that baby gifters (grandparents, friends, family) represent a stronger product-market fit for Nearly Newborn's digital course than direct parent outreach. The outcome: a new 623-contact Gift-Giver sequence built on Crib/Bedding purchase-intent signals, ready to deploy once email is reconnected.

key_insights.title: Product-Aligned Audience Strategy: Gifters, Not Parents
key_insights.detail: Nearly Newborn is a digital course for new and expecting parents that can also be gifted — a key distinction from service-based MMai clients. The most natural buyer is someone looking for a meaningful baby shower or newborn gift. The new Gift-Giver sequence targets people actively searching for crib mattresses and nursery bedding — strong intent signals that they're buying for a baby, making them ideal gift-course prospects. This pivot refocuses outreach from 'Are you expecting?' to 'Know someone expecting? Here's a gift they'll actually use.'

key_insights.title: Zero Campaign Activity — By Design, Not Inaction
key_insights.detail: All 9 sequences remained paused this period. 3,781 total executions, 64 opens (1.69%), and 0 clicks are unchanged from the baseline — confirming no sends occurred. This was intentional: deploying additional volume into the pre-pivot parent-direct messaging would have burned contacts before the gift-giver strategy was ready. The 623 contacts loaded into the new sequence represent fresh, higher-quality targeting.

key_insights.title: Email Integration Disconnected — Single Active Blocker
key_insights.detail: The sender email needs to be reconnected in MMai before any sequence can execute. This is the only remaining blocker to go-live for the Gift-Giver sequence. All other infrastructure is in place: 4-step sequence built, 623 contacts loaded, schedule configured, CTA aligned to free course signup.

key_insights.title: No Bookings Expected — Conversion Model Is Course Signup, Not Appointment
key_insights.detail: Unlike service-based MMai clients, Nearly Newborn's conversion path is: email → click → course landing page → free signup → paid upgrade. Booking metrics are not applicable. Success metrics going forward should focus on click-through rate to the course signup page and free-to-paid conversion tracking once that integration is built.

key_insights.title: 1,627 Total Contacts Loaded in New Sequences — Ready for Activation
key_insights.detail: Combined across both new sequences, 1,627 intent-qualified contacts are loaded and waiting. The 623-contact Gift-Giver sequence (Crib Intent) should be the first to activate given its product alignment. The 1,004-contact Nursery Prep Parent sequence can follow as a secondary audience or be held as a future nurture track.

next_steps.detail: This is the single active blocker. Once the email integration is reconnected, the Gift-Giver sequence can begin executing immediately. All contacts, steps, and scheduling are configured and ready.

next_steps.action: Activate Gift-Giver sequence on reconnected email
next_steps.detail: Deploy NearlyNewborn_GifterCribIntent_Outreach_052326_v1 as the first active campaign. Target: 623 contacts with gift-angle messaging ('Know someone expecting? Give them the prep course most parents wish they'd found sooner'). Monitor open rate and click-through to course signup.

next_steps.action: Map Baby Prep Keywords list (1,117 contacts) to a sequence
next_steps.detail: This list was flagged in Report #1 as the largest untapped audience pool. It remains unconnected to any active sequence. Consider mapping it to the Nursery Prep Parent Sequence or creating a dedicated keyword-aligned sequence for it.

Since bookings are not the conversion metric, set up click tracking to the course landing page and explore free-signup conversion tracking (UTM parameters or pixel) to measure actual funnel performance beyond email engagement.

Following the 14-day Monday cadence. By then, the email should be reconnected, the Gift-Giver sequence should have 1+ weeks of engagement data, and we'll have the first period-over-period comparison with live campaign metrics.
